creator: chs@FreeBSD.org
text:
I forgot to add this PR tag in the commit messages where I added this feature:

commit fd24a63a38d0d4cb4f5041ef232036abe09d9d4f
Author: Chuck Silvers <chs@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Tue Feb 13 08:15:25 2024 -0800

    x86/ucode: add const where appropriate
    
    Sponsored by:   Netflix
    Reviewed by:    markj
    Differential Revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D43865


commit 34467bd762a77345915d07f4f0630c3fe0b53a23
Author: Chuck Silvers <chs@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Thu Feb 22 10:03:53 2024 -0800

    x86/ucode: add support for early loading of CPU ucode on AMD.
    
    Sponsored by:   Netflix
    Reviewed by:    markj
    Differential Revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D43318



Support for this feature was added to the sysutils/cpu-microcode* ports in:

commit 8972ab311c750984f6936ea93e80642beb7f792a (tmp_xxx)
Author: Chuck Silvers <chs@FreeBSD.org>
Date:   Fri Feb 23 09:14:47 2024 -0800

    sysutils/cpu-microcode*: support early loading of AMD ucode
    
    Install the AMD ucode in /boot/firmware for early loading just like
    is done for intel.  Update the instructions for early loading to
    reflect that AMD is now supported too.
    
    Sponsored By:   Netflix
    Reviewed by:    jrm
    Differential Revision:  https://reviews.freebsd.org/D44025
